summary: A figure in classical dress ascends impossible stairs that alternate between solid black blocks and white lined steps, while a disembodied hand below writes on an unfurling scroll, all framed by a burnt-orange border.

pairs.see: Impossible staircase with alternating black and white steps creating visual paradox
pairs.represents: Working across disciplines, navigating the contradictions and inconsistencies in AI benchmark claims

pairs.see: Figure climbing upward on the paradoxical structure
pairs.represents: The journalist's investigative work, ascending through layers of vendor claims and technical evaluations

pairs.see: Disembodied hand writing on unfurling scroll below the stairs
pairs.represents: The annotation work: handwritten notes, circled deltas, and margin questions on printed leaderboards

pairs.see: The scroll connecting the hand to the staircase the figure climbs
pairs.represents: Documentation and verification work that supports the critical analysis of AI performance claims
